title: Zenith Sword
body:
Added a weapon from **Terraria**.

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19ae7b885060f68aef02217a8797c278302992fd.webp)

Right-click to fire 3 projectiles; hold right-click for continuous fire.

It automatically locks onto enemies near the crosshair.

Projectiles ignore invincibility frames, deal damage equal to melee damage, and can trigger the effects of most enchantments.

I am not the author, just reposting on their behalf.

![Permission from the original author](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e7c05acf49c86471ea6b2faabaf994ab97d87f2.png)
